title: viburnum macrocephalum var. keteleeri
intro: Viburnum macrocephalum var. keteleeri, also known as the Chinese Snowball Viburnum, is a variety of flowering shrub native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, due to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are often used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
